title: Indulgent Island Mediterranean Lamb Skewers
description: A citrusy, fluffy, mediterranean dish featuring fried ripe bananas, rest-meat, perfect for kosher-friendly meal prep on a binchotan grill. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner or a weekend get-together.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat (400°F).
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush olive oil onto the grill skewers to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb reaches 145°F.
While the skewers are grilling, heat about 1/2 inch of oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Dust the ripe bananas with flour on all sides.
Fry the bananas in the oil for 2-3 minutes per side, or until golden brown.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let rest for 5 minutes.
Serve the skewers with fried bananas, feta cheese, olives, and cherry tomatoes on top.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
